description: A dairy farmer wants to schedule their robotic feed pusher to run more frequently during the day to encourage cow feed intake.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current schedule for the robotic feed pusher.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the robot is scheduled to run every 2 hours.

nodes.task_description: Update the schedule to have the robot run every hour between 6 AM and 10 PM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the robot's operating schedule.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the new schedule has been accepted by the robot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the new schedule is active.
